items.name: Green Metrics Tool
items.description: The Green Metrics Tool is a developer tool indented for measuring the energy and CO2 consumption of software through a software life cycle analysis (SLCA).

items.name: GreenFrame
items.description: Estimates the carbon footprint of a user scenario on a web application. Full-stack analysis (browser, screen, network, server). Can be used standalone, in a CI/CD pipeline, and in conjunction with the greenframe.io service.

items.name: Cardamon
items.description: Cardamon is a tool to help development teams measure the power consumption and carbon emissions of their software. The tool is built around the concept of observations and scenarios.

items.name: LIMo
items.description: A lightweight monitoring tool for calculating the energy consumption of microservices in Docker containers.
